name: Evil World HOPSCA
short_description: This is a third-person horror escape game. It's weird. You face a million dangers in the mall. Run away from monsters and beware of all kinds of traps. Collect supplies, weapons and items to fight monsters, and medicines to restore various states. Solve puzzles and escape.
detailed_description: This is a third-person horror escape game. It's weird. You face a million dangers in the mall. Run, run hard, run can effectively get rid of the monster chase, but also beware of all kinds of traps. On the way to escape also to collect supplies, weapons and props can effectively stop the monsters approach, and even kill weak monsters, drugs can restore various states. There are also some decryption elements, which are the key to your escape.
about_the_game: This is a third-person horror escape game. It's weird. You face a million dangers in the mall. There are also some decryption elements, which are the key to your escape.
supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, French, Italian, German, Russian, Japanese, Polish, Korean, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
